creator: quentin.thebault@defenso.fr
text:
https://wiki.freebsd.org/bhyve#Q:_Does_bhyve_support_VT-d_PCI_device_pass-through.3F

> A: Yes, on Intel CPUs. See bhyve/pci_passthru.

https://wiki.freebsd.org/bhyve/pci_passthru

> bhyve support AMD-Vi/IOMMU by change r317600. By default AMD-Vi passthrough support is disabled, set hw.vmm.amdvi.enable and reload vmm.ko to enable it.
